metadata.title: Holiday Cottage in Sologne
metadata.description: L'Instant Tranquille, 3-bedroom cottage, sleeps 6, 120 m² in Romorantin-Lanthenay, Sologne. Holiday rental between Loire Valley castles and forests.

home.heroSubtitle: A holiday cottage in Sologne, Romorantin-Lanthenay
home.introText: A 120 m² Sologne house, 3 bedrooms, sleeping up to 6. Surrounded by forests and ponds, 12 km from Chambord and 17 km from the Grand Parquet de Lamotte-Beuvron equestrian centre. A practical base for exploring the region, visiting Loire châteaux, or attending equestrian events.
home.highlightNatureDesc: In the heart of 3 hectares of nature, between forest and ponds, an exceptional setting to recharge.
home.highlightComfortDesc: A fully renovated character house, combining old-world charm with modern comfort.
home.highlightLocationDesc: 30 min from Chambord and Cheverny, the perfect starting point to explore the Loire Valley castles.
home.highlightCalmDesc: Far from urban bustle, enjoy the silence, birdsong, and starry skies at night.
home.ctaTitle: Ready for your stay in Sologne?
home.ctaSubtitle: Book directly on your preferred platform

cottage.title: The Cottage
cottage.description: Discover our charming Sologne house, fully renovated for your comfort.
cottage.descriptionText: L'Instant Tranquille is an authentic Sologne brick-and-timber house, nestled in a lush green setting. Carefully renovated throughout, it combines the charm of traditional architecture with modern comfort. Its 120m² comfortably accommodates up to 6 guests.
cottage.heroImageAlt: Interior of L'Instant Tranquille cottage in Sologne

surroundings.title: Surroundings
surroundings.description: Explore the Sologne region from the cottage: châteaux, forests, lakes, restaurants and activities nearby.

surroundings.heroSubtitle: Châteaux, nature, equestrian sport, the Sologne within easy reach

equestrian.intro: The Sologne is a leading equestrian region. The cottage is a practical base for riders travelling to competitions or on a leisure stay.
equestrian.grandParquetText: A federal FFE (French Equestrian Federation) venue, the Grand Parquet hosts the Generali Open de France each year, one of the most important showjumping competitions on the national calendar. Approximately 17 km from the cottage (20 minutes by car).

faq.a1: No, the cottage has no horse-boarding facilities. It is aimed at riders looking for comfortable accommodation close to equestrian venues, with their horses stabled at the local centres or yards nearby.
faq.q2: How far is the Grand Parquet de Lamotte-Beuvron?
faq.a2: Approximately 17 km from the cottage, around 20 minutes by car via the D724.
faq.q3: Are there any riding centres nearby for leisure activities?
faq.a3: Several equestrian centres are accessible within a 30 km radius of Romorantin-Lanthenay. We can provide contacts on request.
faq.q4: Is the parking at the Grand Parquet suitable for horse trailers and lorries?
faq.a4: The Grand Parquet has dedicated parking for vehicles with trailers during competitions. It is advisable to check parking instructions with the organiser before each event.

equestrian.placeholderAlt: Grand Parquet de Lamotte-Beuvron, FFE equestrian venue
